prestazioni: Engine: Toyota 2GR-FE (3.5L V6, supercharged) – Replace the OEM Eaton TVS1320 supercharger with a Harrop HTV1900 TVS2300 supercharger kit (12.5 psi boost, 550+ hp), paired with a custom Lotus Motorsport-spec fuel system upgrade (dual Bosch Motorsport 450 LPH fuel pumps, ID1000xDS injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator).

Drivetrain: Install a Quaife ATB LSD (QDF7J) with a 4.5:1 final drive ratio in the OEM 6-speed manual transmission, coupled with a Sachs Performance twin-disc carbon clutch (380mm, 4-puck) and a PUK Racing lightweight flywheel (6.5kg).

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (Lotus Cup 430-specific valving) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs, paired with a T45 steel roll cage (Lotus Motorsport homologated, FIA-spec) and polycarbonate rear wing supports (Lotus Exige Cup 430 Evo aero package).
estetica: Aero: Full Lotus Motorsport Cup 430 Evo aero kit (carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts) with a Vortex Generator carbon fiber rear wing (3-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle of attack).
Body: Carbon fiber widebody conversion (Rocket Bunny V3 Exige kit, 30mm wider front fenders, 40mm wider rear) with custom PPF (XPEL Stealth) and a matte vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Satin Black).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Lotus Motorsport Cup 430 seats, door cards, and dashboard) with a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (320mm, suede) and a Motec C127 dash logger (replacing the OEM cluster, integrated with AIM Solo 2 DL GPS data logger).
